parameters.query:
SELECT id, business_name, website, domain, email, email_status, lead_status, outreach_status
FROM lead_master
WHERE lead_status IN ('new', 'needs_enrichment')
  AND email_status IN ('missing', 'not_found_scrape')
  AND website IS NOT NULL
  AND domain IS NOT NULL
  AND outreach_status = 'none'
LIMIT 20

UPDATE lead_master
SET
  email = CASE
    WHEN '{{ $json.final_email_status }}' IN ('verified', 'risky')
         AND '{{ $json.final_email }}' != ''
         AND (email IS NULL OR email_status != 'verified')
    THEN '{{ $json.final_email }}'
    ELSE email
  END,
  email_source_url = CASE
    WHEN '{{ $json.final_email_status }}' IN ('verified', 'risky')
         AND '{{ $json.final_email_source_url }}' != ''
         AND (email IS NULL OR email_status != 'verified')
    THEN '{{ $json.final_email_source_url }}'
    ELSE email_source_url
  END,
  email_found_at = CASE
    WHEN '{{ $json.final_email_status }}' IN ('verified', 'risky')
         AND '{{ $json.final_email }}' != ''
         AND (email IS NULL OR email_status != 'verified')
    THEN NOW()
    ELSE email_found_at
  END,
  email_status = '{{ $json.final_email_status }}',
  lead_status = '{{ $json.final_lead_status }}',
  needs_manual_review = {{ $json.final_needs_manual_review }},
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.id }}'::uuid
  AND NOT (email_status = 'verified' AND '{{ $json.final_email_status }}' = 'risky')
RETURNING id, email, email_status, lead_status, needs_manual_review
